author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 2 complete. APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS (with REDIRECT). 6 BROKEN tests closed (#1063-#1068). 1 real bug found in ferrolearn-metrics AMI implementation, filed as #1073 and gated via #[ignore=#1073] in adjusted_mutual_info_score_mixed_matches_sklearn — bug remains detectable via --include-ignored. The audit-fix series surfaced exactly the class of bug it was designed to find.
